messages.subject: [R-es] Para ejecutar
messages.body_plain:
Estimados:

횂쩔Pueden ejecutar este c횄쨀digo en R?




# Instalar el paquete ggplot2 si no lo tienes instalado
if (!require(ggplot2)) {
  install.packages("ggplot2")
}

# Cargar la librer횄짯a
library(ggplot2)
arg_blue <- "#75AADB"
esp_red <- "#AA151B"
esp_yellow <- "#F1BF00"
p <- ggplot() +
  theme_void() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 50, ymin = 66.6, ymax = 100, fill = arg_blue) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 50, ymin = 33.3, ymax = 66.6, fill = "white") +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 50, ymin = 0, ymax = 33.3, fill = arg_blue) +
  annotate("point", x = 25, y = 50, color = "#FDB813", size = 25) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 50, xmax = 100, ymin = 75, ymax = 100, fill = esp_red) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 50, xmax = 100, ymin = 25, ymax = 75, fill = esp_yellow) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 50, xmax = 100, ymin = 0, ymax = 25, fill = esp_red) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 10, xmax = 90, ymin = 20, ymax = 80, 
           fill = "black", alpha = 0.75, color = "white", size = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = 65, label = "횂징CAMPEONES DEL MUNDO!", 
           color = "white", size = 8, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = 45, label = "Desde Argentina", 
           color = arg_blue, size = 9, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = 50, y = 33, label = "felicitamos a Espa횄짹a", 
           color = esp_yellow, size = 9, fontface = "bold") +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray10", color = NA),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

print(p)
